title: GET /api/warmup endpoint returns pre-warm progress
description: Expose the app.state.warmup_progress dict as a JSON endpoint so the UI can poll progress.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/warmup returns 200 with {step, done, total, finished_at}.
Response is constant-time (no DB or cache reads in the handler).
When step == 'done', UI polling can stop (covered by TASK-029).
Pydantic response schema added to serve/schemas.py.
tests/test_serve_routes.py covers happy path + while-running path.

steps.details: class WarmupProgress(BaseModel): step: Literal['init','snapshot','cache','index','done']; done: int; total: int; finished_at: Optional[str].
tests/test_serve_routes.py: stub warmup_progress; assert response shape + lock acquisition; assert no DB reads occur in the handler (via spy).

technicalNotes: The lock is held for microseconds (dict copy) - no perceptible blocking.
